headline: Why I Can’t Stop Buying This Cash-Rich Stock After a Massive $145 Billion AI Shift

headline: SpaceX Options Start Trading Today. It’s Getting Wild.
summary: Options on  SpaceX  stock are scheduled to begin trading when the stock market opens on Tuesday.  The options trading is likely to boost the stock, though it could create some intraday price swings.  Demand for the stock is so high that the options are likely to be among the most actively traded in the entire options market, joining a pedigreed club that includes  Apple Amazon Nvidia Meta  and others in an exclusive club.

content.title: SpaceX Options Start Trading Today. It’s Getting Wild.
content.summary: Options on  SpaceX  stock are scheduled to begin trading when the stock market opens on Tuesday.  The options trading is likely to boost the stock, though it could create some intraday price swings.  Demand for the stock is so high that the options are likely to be among the most actively traded in the entire options market, joining a pedigreed club that includes  Apple Amazon Nvidia Meta  and others in an exclusive club.

headline: The AI Bubble Burst Calls are Getting Louder. But Hype-Defying Fortresses Prove There’s Deep Value Hiding in Plain Sight.

headline: Howard Marks: Investing in AI Stocks Is ‘Closer to Speculating’ Than Analysis
summary: Although the AI buildout has minted trillions in fresh market value across Wall Street, Howard Marks thinks buyers of these stocks are kidding themselves about what they actually own. On a recent Prof G Markets appearance, Oaktree Capital co-founder Marks laid out a spectrum running from “analytical investing in prosaic, understandable companies” to “speculative investing ...
